nodes.context: Street gang based in Birmingham, England, active from 1880s to 1920s, engaged in robbery, violence, racketeering, illegal bookmaking, and gambling.
Rival street gang in Birmingham, fought Peaky Blinders for territory.
Larger gang led by Billy Kimber that overtook the Peaky Blinders in 1920.
Gang that moved in on the Birmingham Boys and solidified political control over Central England in the 1930s.

edges.context: Peaky Blinders fought the Sloggers for territory in Birmingham and its surrounding districts.
The Birmingham Boys, led by Billy Kimber, overtook the Peaky Blinders in 1920 after a violent backlash over racecourse expansion.
The Sabini gang moved in on the Birmingham Boys and solidified political control over Central England in the 1930s.
